attributes.Sql Query:

/*Added as part of SFP Rel*/
,PTL.DISTRI_EXTERNAL_SOL_NUM
,PTL.MAGIC_KEY_ID
,PTL.CISCO_INTERNAL_POS_FLG
,PTL.NET_PRICE_FLG
,PTL.IS_SERVICE_CONTRACT_POS_FLG

,PTL.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,PTL.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,PTL.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,PTL.AI_STRATEGIC_FACTOR_PCT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE PTL,
(SELECT MIN(CALENDAR_DATE) AS CALENDAR_DATE
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR
WHERE FISCAL_YEAR_AGE = 2) TEMP,
$$STGDB.WI_CHNL_RET_PTL_PARTNER_PPSK PPP
WHERE PTL.TRANSACTION_DATE >= TEMP.CALENDAR_DATE
AND PTL.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = PPP.BK_SOLD_TO_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
AND PTL.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY = PPP.BK_END_USER_WIPS_SITE_USE_KEY
AND PTL.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY <> PPP.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY

SEL 
		BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
	,	DISTI_TO_RESELLER_SO_NUMBER
	,	BASE_LIST_UNIT_PROD_PRICE_AMT
	,	TRANSACTION_DATE
